display_text: Bristleback Aghanim's Scepter: Adds active ability to forcefully eject Quill Sprays in a tight conical pattern. This upgrade counters enemy clustering by threatening massive area denial and damage, forcing opponents to scatter or face burst quill damage.
search_text: Bristleback Aghanim Scepter area denial burst damage quill spray clustering counter-control

display_text: Bristleback Aghanim's Shard: Adds Hairball ability to cough a quill-packed hairball that spreads Viscous Nasal Goo and Quill Spray. This upgrade enhances Bristleback's utility as a debuffer and enables him to initiate fights from a safe distance by applying stacks efficiently.
search_text: Bristleback Aghanim Shard debuffer safe initiation Viscous Nasal Goo Quill Spray Hairball
